bachelors.title: Online BBA Degree
bachelors.description: Gain foundational business management skills, strategic thinking, and analytical capabilities tailored for modern corporate careers.
bachelors.eligibility: 10+2 from a recognized board or equivalent with minimum 45% marks.

bachelors.title: Online BCA Degree
bachelors.description: Master software development, computer applications, database management, and cutting-edge data science technologies.
bachelors.eligibility: 10+2 in any discipline with Mathematics or Computer Science background preferred.

masters.title: Online MBA Degree
masters.description: Accelerate your career with executive leadership skills, global business strategy, financial modeling, and specialized industry electives.
masters.eligibility: Bachelor's degree in any discipline with minimum 50% aggregate marks from a recognized university.

masters.title: Online MCA Degree
masters.description: Advanced computer science education covering cloud computing, AI, machine learning, data engineering, and full-stack software architecture.
masters.eligibility: BCA / B.Sc (Computer Science / IT) or Bachelor's with Mathematics at 10+2 level or graduation.
